positive: Minimalist celestial forest scene, featuring a grouping of stylized, bioluminescent mushrooms and winding roots emerging from stylized, deep indigo soil. The forest is bathed in the ethereal glow of distant, crescent moons and faint constellations. The composition is highly symmetrical and central, emphasizing clean, distinct silhouettes of the flora against a gradient twilight sky. Use a limited palette of deep purples, aqua blues, forest greens, and warm gold highlights. Vector illustration style, line art infused with soft glow effects, high contrast, perfect for screen printing on black or dark apparel.
negative: blur, artifacts, text, watermark, noise, low detail, poor anatomy, ugly, extra limbs, gradient fade, photography, realistic, messy, graffiti, logos
